t.t-value: len(order.project_product_name or '') + len(order.product_id.name or '') + len(order.multi_chose_ids or '') + sum(len(a.name or '') for a in order.product_atts if a.attribute_id and a.attribute_id.name != '冷裱')
2 if text_len > NAME_LIMIT else 1 + (1.6 if (doc.checkout_order_type == 'd' and not doc.is_sign) else 0)

len(order.project_product_name or '') + len(order.product_id.name or '') + len(order.multi_chose_ids or '') + sum(len(a.name or '') for a in order.product_atts if a.attribute_id and a.attribute_id.name != '冷裱')

div.div: 匯款銀行:玉山銀行808 中和分行0439 戶名:科影數位影像股份有限公司. 帳號:0439940021915

div.t-attf-style: border-bottom:1px solid lightgray;margin-bottom:10px; height: #{'160px' if show_second_row else '100px'};

t.t-value: len(order.project_product_name or '') + len(order.product_id.name or '') + len(order.multi_chose_ids or '') + sum(len(a.name or '') for a in order.product_atts if a.attribute_id and a.attribute_id.name != '冷裱')

div.div: 匯款銀行:玉山銀行808 中和分行0439 戶名:科影數位影像股份有限公司. 帳號:0439940021915

div.t-attf-style: border-bottom:1px solid lightgray;margin-bottom:10px; height: #{'160px' if show_second_row else '100px'};

record.field:
'%s-%s-%s-報價單' % ( (object.name or '報價單'), (object.is_new_partner and (object.new_partner or '客戶') or (object.customer_id and object.customer_id.name) or '客戶'),
(object.project_name or '') )
'%s-%s-%s-報價單' % ( (object.name or '報價單'), (object.is_new_partner and (object.new_partner or '客戶') or (object.customer_id and object.customer_id.name) or '客戶'), (object.project_name or '') )

t.t-value: len(order.project_product_name or '') + len(order.product_id.name or '') + len(order.multi_chose_ids or '') + sum(len(a.name or '') for a in order.product_atts if a.attribute_id and a.attribute_id.name != '冷裱')
2 if text_len > NAME_LIMIT else 1 + (1.5 if (doc.checkout_order_type == 'd' and not doc.is_sign) else 0)

len(order.project_product_name or '') + len(order.product_id.name or '') + len(order.multi_chose_ids or '') + sum(len(a.name or '') for a in order.product_atts if a.attribute_id and a.attribute_id.name != '冷裱')

len(order.project_product_name or '') + len(order.product_id.name or '') + len(order.multi_chose_ids or '') + sum(len(a.name or '') for a in order.product_atts if a.attribute_id and a.attribute_id.name != '冷裱')

div.div: 匯款銀行:玉山銀行808 中和分行0439 戶名:科影數位影像股份有限公司. 帳號:0439940021915

div.t-attf-style: border-bottom:1px solid lightgray;margin-bottom:10px; height: #{'160px' if has_manager_sign else '100px'};

div.style: display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:6px; height: #{'90px' if not has_manager_sign else '90px'};
